features: GREAT TREAT FOR YOUR SKIN -- Thick and luxurious, this Vanilla Body Butter will envelop skin in an explosion of intense, invigorating and vibrant vanilla that melts into skin leaving it smooth, hydrated and conditioned.

SPECIALLY FORMULATED FOR NOURISHING YOUR SKIN -- Derma V10 Vanilla Body Butter is formulated for a rich thick texture, suitable for normal to dry skin, leaving your skin feeling nourished and healthy looking.
LEAVES YOUR SKIN SOFT AND SILKY SMOOTH -- Instant moisturisation leaves your skin feeling soft, smooth and smelling great.
EASY TO USE -- Just scoop a generous amount of body butter into your hand, and apply anywhere on the skin, gently rubbing until it is fully soaked in.
Package contents: Derma V10 Vanilla Body Butter, 220 ml. The actual packaging may vary.
description: Thick and luxurious, this Vanilla Body Butter will envelop skin in an explosion of intense, invigorating and vibrant vanilla that melts into skin leaving it smooth, hydrated and conditioned. Derma V10 Vanilla Body Butter is formulated for a rich thick texture, suitable for normal to dry skin, leaving your skin feeling nourished and healthy looking. Instant moisturisation leaves your skin feeling soft, smooth and smelling great. Just scoop a generous amount of body butter into your hand, and apply anywhere on the skin, gently rubbing until it is fully soaked in. Vegan friendly.
